game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **タイムサーファー (Time Surfer)**: Players control a character surfing endlessly across procedurally generated cosmic platforms, continuously moving right. Tapping and holding the screen causes the character to dive, gaining speed and descending slopes, while releasing makes them rise, utilizing gravity to navigate terrain and collect scattered gems. A unique "time rewind" mechanic, activated by swiping left, allows players to reverse gameplay for approximately 3 seconds to correct mistakes or avoid obstacles, consuming a limited "time energy" resource. The game features an ever-approaching "cosmic end" from the left, and obstacles like spikes or gaps cause instant death, which can be mitigated by rewinding. Progression involves using collected gems to unlock new character skins, cosmetic pets, and permanent upgrades to time energy capacity or initial speed, with difficulty scaling as the cosmic end accelerates and terrain complexity increases.
game_info.description: Surf across cosmic platforms while collecting gems and avoiding obstacles! The cosmic end chases you from the left - stay ahead or perish. Dive to gain speed down slopes, release to rise up. Use your limited time rewind ability to undo mistakes and escape danger. Collect gems to increase your score and survive as long as possible!
game_info.controls:
SPACE: Hold to dive (gain speed), Release to rise
Z: Activate time rewind (costs time energy)
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and survival test. This validates that the player can move, collect gems, and avoid basic obstacles without using advanced mechanics.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate the terrain using dive and rise mechanics. Avoid gaps and spikes by maintaining appropriate height. Collect gems when safe. Focus on survival rather than optimal gem collection.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should survive for at least 30 seconds, demonstrating basic control competency. The test validates movement physics, collision detection, and basic obstacle avoidance.

TEST_2.test_description: Advanced survival and time rewind test. This validates the complete gameplay loop including the time rewind mechanic to recover from dangerous situations.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Aggressively collect gems while using dive mechanics for speed. When approaching dangerous obstacles or the cosmic end gets too close, use time rewind strategically to create distance and avoid death. Optimize gem collection to maximize score.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should survive for at least 60 seconds, collect significant gems, and successfully use time rewind at least once to avoid death. This validates all core mechanics working together for extended gameplay.
